revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月初二]][[zh:八月初二]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 2|qq=August 2}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Sushun|en|Emperor Sushun|qid=Q349238|lt=Sosun Emperor|1=Emperor Sushun}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|587|en|587|qid=Q30891|lt=587|1=587}} {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}} ) – The 12th son of {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|qid=Q329792|lt=Kinmei Emperor|1=Emperor Kinmei}} , {{ill|Tomarisebe no Ōji|ja|泊瀬部皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomarisebe no Ōji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 崇峻天皇|1=Emperor Sushun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q349238}} , ascended the throne as the 32nd Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Sushun|en|Emperor Sushun|qid=Q349238|lt=Sosun Emperor|1=Emperor Sushun}} . * {{ill|Engi (era)|en|Engi (era)|qid=Q1374325|lt=Engi|1=Engi (era)}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|901|en|901|qid=Q23580|lt=901|1=901}} {{ill|September 17|en|September 17|qid=Q2894|lt=September 17|1=September 17}} ) – The ''{{ill|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|en|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|qid=Q1052981|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}} '' was completed. * {{ill|Jiryaku|en|Jiryaku|qid=Q934365|lt=Jiryaku|1=Jiryaku}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1065|en|1065|qid=Q19407|lt=1065|1=1065}} {{ill|September 4|en|September 4|qid=Q2855|lt=September 4|1=September 4}} ) – To avoid the misfortune of the "Three Harmonies Curse" ({{ill|Sangō no Yaku|ja|三合の厄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangō no Yaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ), the era was changed from {{ill|Kōhei|en|Kōhei|qid=Q1193572|lt=Kōhei|1=Kōhei}} to {{ill|Jiryaku|en|Jiryaku|qid=Q934365|lt=Jiryaku|1=Jiryaku}} . * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1721|en|1721|qid=Q6913|lt=1721|1=1721}} {{ill|September 23|en|September 23|qid=Q2888|lt=September 23|1=September 23}} ) – On the orders of {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|ja|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yoshimune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q319664}} , a suggestion box ({{ill|meyasuibako|ja|目安箱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/meyasuibako|1=meyasubako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11581555}} ) was installed in front of the Edo council hall ({{ill|Hyōjōsho|en|Hyōjōsho|qid=Q5962798|lt=Hyōteijo|1=Hyōjōsho}} ). * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|September 2|en|September 2|qid=Q2857|lt=September 2|1=September 2}} ) – The First Chōshū Expedition ({{ill|Dai-Ichi Chōshū Seitō|ja|第一次長州征討|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dai-Ichi Chōshū Seitō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 長州征討|1=Chōshū Expeditions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q113587768}} ) took place. == Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1723|en|1723|qid=Q6921|lt=1723|1=1723}} {{ill|September 1|en|September 1|qid=Q2859|lt=September 1|1=September 1}} ) – {{ill|Miura Baien|en|Miura Baien|qid=Q8192957|lt=Miura Baien|1=Miura Baien}} , a thinker ({{ill|shisōka|ja|Thinker|1=thinker|2=ja|3=思想家|lt=thinker|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/shisōka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24885626}} ) (died {{ill|1789|en|1789|qid=Q7772|lt=1789|1=1789}} ). == Deaths == * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1595|en|1595|qid=Q6782|lt=1595|1=1595}} {{ill|September 5|en|September 5|qid=Q2854|lt=September 5|1=September 5}} ) – {{ill|Komahime|ja|駒姫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komahime|1=Komahime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11668336}} , the concubine of {{ill|Toyotomi Hidetsugu|en|Toyotomi Hidetsugu|qid=Q967501|lt=Toyotomi Hidetsugu|1=Toyotomi Hidetsugu}} (born {{ill|1581|en|1581|qid=Q6717|lt=1581|1=1581}} ). * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1595|en|1595|qid=Q6782|lt=1595|1=1595}} {{ill|September 5|en|September 5|qid=Q2854|lt=September 5|1=September 5}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Senchiyomaru|ja|豊臣仙千代丸|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Senchiyomaru|1=Toyotomi Senchiyomaru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11634223}} , the eldest son of {{ill|Toyotomi Hidetsugu|en|Toyotomi Hidetsugu|qid=Q967501|lt=Toyotomi Hidetsugu|1=Toyotomi Hidetsugu}} (born {{ill|1590|en|1590|qid=Q6764|lt=1590|1=1590}} ). * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1595|en|1595|qid=Q6782|lt=1595|1=1595}} {{ill|September 5|en|September 5|qid=Q2854|lt=September 5|1=September 5}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Tsuchimaru|ja|豊臣土丸|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Tsuchimaru|1=Toyotomi Tsuchimaru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11634222}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Toyotomi Hidetsugu|en|Toyotomi Hidetsugu|qid=Q967501|lt=Toyotomi Hidetsugu|1=Toyotomi Hidetsugu}} (birth year unknown). * {{ill|正德|en|正德|qid=Q11123425|lt=Shōtoku (Japan)|1=正德}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1714|en|1714|qid=Q6878|lt=1714|1=1714}} {{ill|September 10|en|September 10|qid=Q2853|lt=September 10|1=September 10}} ) – {{ill|Hishikawa Moronobu|en|Hishikawa Moronobu|qid=Q746217|lt=Hishikawa Morinobu|1=Hishikawa Moronobu}} , an ukiyo-e artist. * {{ill|Genbun|en|Genbun|qid=Q1145754|lt=Genbun|1=Genbun}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1738|en|1738|qid=Q6996|lt=1738|1=1738}} {{ill|September 15|en|September 15|qid=Q2846|lt=September 15|1=September 15}} ) – {{ill|Uejima Onitsura|en|Uejima Onitsura|qid=Q240176|lt=Ueshima Onikanetsu|1=Uejima Onitsura}} , a haiku poet (born {{ill|1661|en|1661|qid=Q7005|lt=1661|1=1661}} ).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|1|8|3|7|2|9|8|0802|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 8월 2일]] [[ja:8月2日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月初二]]
